title: Faron Tolis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Faron_MC95.jpg]] |name=Faron Tolis |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]][[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[Alliance of Free Planets]] *[[Nagai expeditionary force]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|A fool, clumsy and obvious. Predictable. Not a Nagai.|Den Siva|}} '''Faron Tolis''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] member of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. A [[Scout/Legends|scout]], Tolis was dispatched in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] to investigate strange life readings on the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]], only to discover the vanguard of the [[Nagai expeditionary force]] preparing for an [[Nagai–Tof War|invasion]] of the larger [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. The only survivor of his team, Tolis agreed to serve the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] in exchange for his life, but was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Nagai warrior [[Den Siva]] while attempting to rescue Alliance agent [[Dani/Legends|Dani]] from [[Torture/Legends|torture]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I'm not a Rebel... not anymore. The Rebellion is over! We won. I'm part of the Alliance of Free Planets now!"
"Allied you may be, but you are still rebels... rebelling against the inevitable... against us, against the will of our masters... and I begin to lose patience with you."
"I'm not afraid."
"Then you are a fool, I think.|Faron Tolis and Lumiya|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Faron Tolis served as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and later the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Alliance [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] dispatched Tolis, as part of a team of 20, on a mission to the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]], which had inexplicably begun to register life readings. There, they stumbled upon the harbinger of a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Nagai–Tof War|invasion]], when the Alliance team were ambushed and captured by [[Lumiya]], the "[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]]," and a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Nagai expeditionary force|vanguard force]] from the [[Firefist]] dwarf galaxy.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' Lumiya and her Nagai [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], [[Den Siva]], soon [[Death/Legends|killed]] 19 of Tolis' squad—he was left as the only survivor, and was [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] for information on the Alliance's leaders. Threatened with death himself, Tolis offered information on Skywalker, a figure whom Lumiya had a deep-seated personal grudge against. This saved Tolis' life for a time, as Lumiya and Siva allowed him to live if he served them, performing tasks such as seeing after the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]] [[Dani/Legends|Dani]].[[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] Tolis remained on Kinooine as the main Nagai expeditionary force arrived to establish a permanent base on the planet, serving Siva as the Nagai brutally tortured Dani in attempting to learn the secrets of her unfamiliar Zeltron physiology. Although Tolis had been cowed into subservience until that point, watching the unbearable agony inflicted upon the Zeltron pushed him past his breaking point. Tolis attempted to save Dani by sneaking up behind Siva with a [[Knife/Legends|knife]]—however, Siva anticipated the attack, and killed Tolis by throwing a blade through his chest. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|If you have a heart, or a conscience, Faron, you might be thankful—or perhaps guilty—that you are a mere human—and totally ordinary. We accepted your surrender and agreed to let you serve us.|Den Siva|}} Faron Tolis ultimately valued his own life over his commitment to the Alliance of Free Planets, willingly offering information on his commanding officer Luke Skywalker in order to prevent his execution at Nagai hands. Furthermore, Tolis consented to serving under his Nagai captors in order to preserve his life, even as they plotted war against his Alliance, referring to Lumiya and Den Siva as "Lady Lumiya" and "Master Den." However, watching the relentless torture of Dani at Siva's hands proved to be a bridge too far for the man, causing him to launch a doomed attempt on Siva's life. ==Behind the scenes== Faron Tolis first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]], written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]], illustrated by [[Cynthia Martin]] and released in [[1985]]. Initially unnamed in his first two appearances, the name "Faron" was given in [[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]], and the character later received the last name "Tolis" in the [[2009]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]-exclusive article "[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]."{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 95}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 96}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 97}} {{1stID|Faron}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}} {{1stID|Tolis}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tolis, Faron}} [[Category:Alliance Military members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scouts]]
